title: Assistant Store Manager - Milton - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Milton - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Milton are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Milton:
Milton is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton!
